violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found at greater than 400ppm Quat.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Burritos in under counter cooler are not dated with thaw date.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Using cloth under pitchers at espresso machine. -Storage shelves in kitchen area appear to be unsealed particle board. -Cloth curtains covering espresso area cabinets. -Side walls of cabinets where trash can sets under coffee pot appear to be raw/rough surfaces.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. -Did not locate thermometers in small table top cooler or milk cooler at coffee prep area. -Residential black refrigerator did not have thermometer in unit. *COS-moved extra thermometer from under counter unit to residential unit.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sanitizer in dishwasher found at 0ppm Chlorine. *The chemical seems to dispense fine, however, the sanitizer chemical (dated 2019) does not appear to be good. -Used test strip directly in chemical and found it at ~200ppm Chlorine. *Will have to manually sanitize dishes until corrected.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -2 cases of single use stored on floor in kitchen. -Sleeves of food boxes stored on floor between shelf units in kitchen.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Plastic silverware at customer station is not inverted. -Plastic silverware at center kitchen island are not inverted.
